sys_ui_page.html:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <j:jelly trim="false" xmlns:j="jelly:core" xmlns:g="glide" xmlns:j2="null" xmlns:g2="null" >
<g2:no_escape> ${HTML:'<!DOCTYPE HTML>'} </g2:no_escape> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"/> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"/> <title> DigiCert Trust Lifecycle Manager </title> </head> <body> <script> window.g_ck = "${JS:gs.getSession().getSessionToken()}"; </script> <div id="root"/> <script defer="defer" src="/x_dice_digicertone.vendor.3.js.jsdbx?4a0b74d7"/><script defer="defer" src="/x_dice_digicertone.vendor.2.js.jsdbx?e5ecbcd0"/><script defer="defer" src="/x_dice_digicertone.vendor.1.js.jsdbx?6443a211"/><script defer="defer" src="/x_dice_digicertone.main.js.jsdbx?4d23fc03"/> </body> </html> </j:jelly>
sys_ui_page.name: App
